message: Integrate bubblezone for mouse hit detection

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ import (
 	"time"
 
 	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
+	zone "github.com/lrstanley/bubblezone"
 
 	"github.com/steipete/tmuxwatch/internal/tmux"
 	"github.com/steipete/tmuxwatch/internal/ui"
@@ -21,6 +22,8 @@ var version = "dev"
 
 // main configures the tmux client, handles flag modes, and launches Bubble Tea.
 func main() {
+	zone.NewGlobal()
+
 	var (
 		interval   = flag.Duration("interval", time.Second, "tmux poll interval")
 		tmuxBin    = flag.String("tmux", "", "path to tmux binary (defaults to PATH lookup)")

@@ -114,6 +114,7 @@ require (
 	github.com/ldez/tagliatelle v0.7.1 // indirect

 	github.com/leonklingele/grouper v1.1.2 // indirect

 	github.com/lucasb-eyer/go-colorful v1.3.0 // indirect
 	github.com/macabu/inamedparam v0.1.3 // indirect

@@ -64,19 +65,9 @@ type sessionPreview struct {
 }
 
 type cardBounds struct {
-	sessionID    string
-	top          int
-	height       int
-	left         int
-	width        int
-	closeLeft    int
-	closeRight   int
-	closeLine    int
-	closeTop     int

-	marginTop    int

 }

@@ -89,6 +80,7 @@ type commandItem struct {
 type Model struct {

+	zonePrefix   string

 	height int
@@ -133,6 +125,7 @@ func NewModel(client *tmux.Client, poll time.Duration, debugMsgs []tea.Msg, trac
 	return &Model{
 		client:       client,
 		pollInterval: poll,
+		zonePrefix:   zone.NewPrefix(),
 		previews:     make(map[string]*sessionPreview),
 		hidden:       make(map[string]struct{}),
 		stale:        make(map[string]struct{}),
